title: Chain directory
description: The Chain directory contains classes that provide common functionality for Mapper and Reducer classes in a Hadoop MapReduce program. The Chain class provides a method to create a Configuration for a Map or Reduce task in a chain, while the ChainMapper and ChainReducer classes allow multiple Mapper and Reducer classes to be chained together within a single task. The classes depend on the Apache Hadoop MapReduce library and the Configuration class.
